title: The Colosseum Pressure Builds
description: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Franky, Fujitora, Luffy, Nami, Violet, Unknown person #1 as the Tontatta prepare their plan against Doflamingo while Franky, the Toy Soldier, and the rebels reveal Dressrosa’s hidden suffering.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Those three... their footholds are all that's left !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Someone know I

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: That Fleet Admiral didn't train you very well!! You're nothing but a wild dog!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...Looks like it really doesn't matter whether he's blind or not ...

dialogue.speaker: Violet
dialogue.text: You honor me... but truly... I was just testing my ability...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Dressrosa: Franky's location

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Flower Fields!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You going on a picnic or something !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Where are you exactly, off dawdling around, Sanji...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'm in love

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oh, well that's nice

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Really!?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: By the way, it seems I've found the factory

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But it appears that we can't just bust it up and leave, just like that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's a much bigger job than we could have imagined...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hey, you can't just put that on a tab!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Someone, catch that toy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We don't have much time. Do- Flamingo

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yeah, I read the special edition

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He really got us good. Looks like he'll get Caesar back too

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And all our plans have come to nothing

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: So let's really give it to him by smashing that factory

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Anyway, you should get over here now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Head to the flower fields!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Wait

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Like I said, why the hell is our target such a fairy- tale sounding place!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But that aside, I can't get in touch with nami-san

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You can't reach the sunny- go?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I wonder if Nami-san is alright

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Do you still think she's really that weak!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't worry. She's also got brook and monster chopper with her!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Pumpster, I'll

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hmm? What's wrong?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Cummmm, I

dialogue.speaker: Violet
dialogue.text: What's that, Violet- Chan?

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: It's a broad- cast of the colosseum

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: This mysterious gladiator!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This Lucy is a strong one!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: > Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That little guy sure is something

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Franky, don't be alarmed, but Luffy is ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ah... he's participating in a fighting tournament

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You let him do what I?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I told you to keep an eye on him !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That's rich, coming from you

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Ah... "Black leg," I can't stay here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: My men are coming!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: You're looking for the secret factory, yes...? Here's a map to it

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: It says "toy house" on the front. That's the factory

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No, you shouldn't. If you cooperate with me this much...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What a strange guy you are... My betrayal has surely already been reported to the higher-ups

dialogue.speaker: Violet
dialogue.text: Violet- CHAN...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The Western Harbor!!! That's where we'll render- Vous!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Until I get there, hide yourself and wait!! It's where my crew is meeting up

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: All a

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: you....!! I'll do everything I can to help you escape this place!!!

summary: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
